items.caption: Donald Duck thinking: "I DON'T SEEM TO BE SLEEPY! MAYBE A SNACK OF CHEESE AND COLD CUTS WILL FIX ME UP!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck thinking: "I DON'T SEEM TO BE SLEEPY! MAYBE A SNACK OF CHEESE AND COLD CUTS WILL FIX ME UP!"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_3_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck eating a snack and laughing: "NO ICEBOXES FULL OF SNACKS WHERE GLADSTONE'S GOING! ALL ICE AND NO BOXES! HAW!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck eating a snack and laughing: "NO ICEBOXES FULL OF SNACKS WHERE GLADSTONE'S GOING! ALL ICE AND NO BOXES! HAW!"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck eating a sandwich and thinking: "HE'LL NEVER GUESS THAT I SENT HIM THERE! AND I WON'T TELL HIM WHEN HE GETS BACK!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck eating a sandwich and thinking: "HE'LL NEVER GUESS THAT I SENT HIM THERE! AND I WON'T TELL HIM WHEN HE GETS BACK!"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_6_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck looking worried while eating: "IF HE GETS BACK!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck looking worried while eating: "IF HE GETS BACK!"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_4_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck looking startled in a circular frame.
items.md: ![Donald Duck looking startled in a circular frame.](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_10_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck leaning on a table looking concerned.
items.md: ![Donald Duck leaning on a table looking concerned.](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_2_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck looking out a window in fear: "ICEBERGS AND POLAR BEARS! I WONDER IF POLAR BEARS EAT PEOPLE?"
items.md: ![Donald Duck looking out a window in fear: "ICEBERGS AND POLAR BEARS! I WONDER IF POLAR BEARS EAT PEOPLE?"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_8_v2.jpg)

items.caption: Donald Duck imagining a fat polar bear that has eaten someone, with the thought: "OH, ME! OH, MY!"
items.md: ![Donald Duck imagining a fat polar bear that has eaten someone, with the thought: "OH, ME! OH, MY!"](CBatAotCB-042_page_1_image_5_v2.jpg)
